name: MongoDB 3.x text log
sampleLines: 2024-04-28T04:02:03.123+0000 I NETWORK  [listener] connection accepted from 127.0.0.1:54321 #42 (1 connection now open)
2024-04-28T04:02:05.789-04:00 E QUERY    [conn42] Error executing query: bad cursor
2024-04-28T04:02:06.000Z D2 COMMAND  [conn7] run command admin.$cmd { isMaster: 1 }
description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/mongodb (Apache-2.0), entry MONGO3_LOG. Inlined %{TIMESTAMP_ISO8601}, %{WORD}, %{NOTSPACE}, %{GREEDYDATA} macros to plain PCRE2; the severity letter (F/E/W/I/D) is documented in the MongoDB 3.x 'Log Messages' chapter and survives into 4.x text logs as a legacy fallback.
